customer.accept_transfer_description: By accepting, you will become the owner of this workspace and responsible for its billing.
customer.accept_transfer_disclaimer: The transfer will be completed immediately upon acceptance.
customer.add_payment_method_description: Add a credit or debit card to manage your subscriptions.
customer.add_payment_method_first: You need to add a payment method before creating a workspace.
customer.billing_address_description: This address will appear on your invoices.
customer.billing_description: Manage the subscription and billing for this workspace.
customer.card_details_description: Your data is processed securely by Stripe.
customer.create_workspace_description: Create a new workspace for your team.
customer.dashboard_description: Manage your workspaces and billing information.
customer.delete_account_warning: This action is irreversible. All your data will be permanently deleted.
customer.new_owner_details_description: Enter the email of the person who will receive ownership of this workspace.
customer.no_active_subscription: No active subscription for this workspace.
customer.no_invoices_description: Your invoices will appear here when you have charges.
customer.no_payment_method_warning: You don't have a payment method yet. Add one to manage your subscriptions.
customer.no_payment_methods_description: Add a payment method to subscribe to plans and add-ons.
customer.no_workspaces_description: Create your first workspace to get started.
customer.notes_placeholder: Add a message for the recipient...
customer.payment_methods_description: Manage your credit and debit cards.
customer.profile_description: Manage your personal and billing information.
customer.recipient_email_help: An email will be sent to this person with a link to accept the transfer.
customer.secure_processing_description: Your payment data is encrypted and processed securely by Stripe. We never store your card details.
customer.start_managing_billing: Start managing your workspaces and billing.
customer.stripe_card_element_placeholder: Stripe card element will be rendered here
customer.transfer_already_completed: This transfer has already been completed.
customer.transfer_link_expired_descripti: The transfer link you are trying to access has expired. Request a new invitation from the current owner.
customer.transfer_not_available: This transfer is no longer available.
customer.transfer_ownership_description: Transfer ownership of this workspace to another person.
customer.transfer_warning_description: By transferring, you will lose administrative access and billing responsibility will be transferred to the new owner.
customer.transfer_was_cancelled: This transfer was cancelled by the owner.
customer.transfer_was_rejected: This transfer was rejected by the recipient.
customer.workspace_details_description: Basic information about the new workspace.
customer.workspace_slug_help: This will be your workspace address. Use only letters, numbers, and hyphens.
customer.workspaces_manage_description: Manage all your workspaces and their subscriptions.
customer.you_have_been_invited: You have been invited to receive ownership of a workspace.
